appraisal_events.evidence: « Je ne l'ai pas vu, ton mari, depuis plusieurs jours ... depuis cette charmante plaisanterie de se faire annoncer comme la reine de Suède » (dit d'un ton susceptible et fâché).
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme de Villeparisis, pained and irritated, reproaches the duke for his 'plaisanterie' of having had himself announced as the Queen of Sweden, marking an unfavorable judgment.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, the duke is depreciated by Mme de Villeparisis’s reprimand for his joke judged out of place.
